Metadata.title: Ship For Good BCN — 1st Edition
Metadata.description: Devs, Product Managers and Designers working together to create real solutions for teams with impact. 29–30 May 2026 at 42 Barcelona.

Hero.headline: It's not another hackathon. It's the first one built for those who truly need it.
Hero.subheadline: Devs, Product Managers and Designers working together to create real solutions. No prizes. No hype. Only impact.
Hero.cta: I want to build something that helps (Coming very soon)

Schedule.title: Two days, one mission
Schedule.intro_description: A hackathon with purpose: helping social organizations and benefiting society. In this first edition, we'll work with Civio, where we'll outline the problems they face every day to achieve their mission. We'll help by putting technology and the new reality of AI-powered development at their service.
Schedule.day1_description: Civio presents the real challenges to work on. Teams are formed (you can come with yours or join one). First sketches and networking.
Schedule.day2_description: Full-day work session: dev, design and product running in parallel. Profile-specific talks throughout the day. Continuous mentoring to unblock and advance. Final showcase of the most ambitious AI-powered solutions built during the event.

CivioSection.title: Who help us
CivioSection.civio_description: <civio>Fundación Civio</civio> is an independent foundation that monitors public power, fights institutional opacity, and uses journalism, technology, and open data to give citizens access to information.
CivioSection.quote: The challenges we will work on are theirs. The impact, everyone's.
CivioSection.venue_description: A coding school by Fundación Telefónica with an innovative peer-to-peer learning model. A global community of students and technology professionals that fosters personal and professional growth through technical excellence and continuous learning.
CivioSection.supporter_description: A community of developers passionate about code craftsmanship, engineering best practices, and continuous professional growth. We promote technical excellence, collaborative learning, and the construction of quality software through shared knowledge and experience.

HowItWorks.title: What do you get?
HowItWorks.benefit_1: Product + AI + people — real metrics, AI-assisted product development.
HowItWorks.benefit_2: Profile-specific talks for devs, PMs and designers.
HowItWorks.benefit_5: Community of people who want to build things that matter.
HowItWorks.who_description: For developers, product managers and designers at any level: students, juniors or seniors. Your attitude is what matters.

faq1.question: Do I need to come with a team?
faq1.answer: No. You can form one on Friday.

faq2.question: Are there prizes?
faq2.answer: No. The prize is that what you build actually gets used.

faq3.question: Do I need prior hackathon experience?

faq4.question: What happens to what we build?
faq4.answer: The goal is that solutions have life beyond the event.

faq6.question: Do I need to attend both days?

faq7.question: Will there be mentors and talks?
faq7.answer: Yes. There will be continuous mentoring to unblock issues and advance. Plus, profile-specific talks for devs, PMs and designers throughout the event.

faq8.question: What happens with my idea if we don't finish it?
faq8.answer: You can keep working on it after. The goal is for it to have life beyond the event.

Footer.closing: What you build here can change something for real.
Footer.register_cta: Coming soon, you'll be able to register →
